---
applyTo: "src/**/*.ts"
---

# TypeScript Instructions

> Full TypeScript standards: `.claude/skills/typescript-standards/SKILL.md`
> Supporting references: `.claude/skills/typescript-standards/references/`

Apply strict TypeScript patterns documented in those files to all `.ts` source files.

Key areas covered in the source files:

- Branded/nominal types for entity IDs (see `src/types/index.ts` for project-specific brands)
- Advanced generics, conditional types, mapped types
- Type guards and discriminated unions
- `tsconfig.json` strict mode configuration
- Utility types and helper patterns
